name: Supervisor Core V1 Lean
description: R22 Supervisor Core with dead output cleanup, heartbeat-only storm lifecycle authority, named storm others, staticData cleanup, and grouped delivery failure UX.

parameters.query: WITH current AS (SELECT status,error_count,opened_at,last_error_at FROM circuit_state WHERE circuit_key='supervisor' FOR UPDATE), upserted AS (INSERT INTO circuit_state (circuit_key,status,error_count,last_error_at,updated_at) VALUES ('supervisor','closed',1,NOW(),NOW()) ON CONFLICT (circuit_key) DO UPDATE SET error_count=CASE WHEN circuit_state.status='closed' AND circuit_state.last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' THEN 1 WHEN circuit_state.status='closed' THEN circuit_state.error_count+1 WHEN circuit_state.status='half_open' THEN circuit_state.error_count+1 ELSE circuit_state.error_count END, status=CASE WHEN circuit_state.status='closed' AND (CASE WHEN circuit_state.last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' THEN 1 ELSE circuit_state.error_count+1 END)>=5 THEN 'open' WHEN circuit_state.status='half_open' AND circuit_state.error_count+1>=2 THEN 'open' WHEN circuit_state.status='half_open' THEN 'half_open' ELSE circuit_state.status END, opened_at=CASE WHEN circuit_state.status='closed' AND (CASE WHEN circuit_state.last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' THEN 1 ELSE circuit_state.error_count+1 END)>=5 THEN NOW() WHEN circuit_state.status='half_open' AND circuit_state.error_count+1>=2 THEN NOW() ELSE circuit_state.opened_at END, half_open_at=CASE WHEN circuit_state.status='half_open' AND circuit_state.error_count+1>=2 THEN NULL ELSE circuit_state.half_open_at END, last_error_at=NOW(), updated_at=NOW() RETURNING *), transition_log AS (INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id,event_type,workflow_name,execution_id,severity,status,fingerprint,payload) SELECT ($1::jsonb)->>'traceId','circuit_transition',($1::jsonb)->>'workflowName',($1::jsonb)->>'executionId','warning',u.status,($1::jsonb)->>'fingerprint',jsonb_build_object('from',c.status,'to',u.status,'error_count',u.error_count,'category',($1::jsonb)->>'category') FROM upserted u JOIN current c ON TRUE WHERE c.status IS NOT NULL AND u.status<>c.status RETURNING id), fp_context AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS fp_alerts_24h, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS fp_alerts_1h, MAX(created_at) AS fp_last_alert_at, MIN(created_at) AS fp_first_alert_at, COUNT(DISTINCT workflow_name) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS fp_workflows_24h FROM supervisor_events WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='processed' AND fingerprint=($1::jsonb)->>'fingerprint') SELECT u.status,u.error_count,u.opened_at,c.status AS previous_status,c.last_error_at AS previous_last_error_at,EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM transition_log) AS transition_logged,CASE WHEN c.status='closed' AND u.status='open' THEN 'closed_threshold' WHEN c.status='half_open' AND u.status='open' THEN 'half_open_reopen' ELSE NULL END AS transition_reason,fp.* FROM upserted u LEFT JOIN current c ON TRUE CROSS JOIN fp_context fp

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ traceId: $json.traceId, workflowName: $json.workflowName, executionId: $json.executionId, fingerprint: $json.fingerprint, workflowId: $json.workflowId, failedNode: $json.failedNode, category: $json.category }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ traceId:$json.traceId, workflowName:$json.workflowName, workflowId:$json.workflowId, executionId:$json.executionId, executionUrl:$json.executionUrl, failedNode:$json.failedNode, errorExcerpt:String($json.errorMessage||'').slice(0,500), severity:$json.severity, fingerprint:$json.fingerprint, retryable:String($json.retryable), retryGate:$json.retryGate, retryOf:$json.retryOf||'', retryNote:$json.retryNote, error_count:$json.error_count, category:$json.category, burstSuppressedCount:$json.burstSuppressedCount, is_db_error:String($json.is_db_error), is_newly_open:String($json.is_newly_open||false), circuit_status:$json.circuit_status||'', previous_status:$json.previous_status||'', transition_reason:$json.transition_reason||'', noveltyMarker:$json.noveltyMarker||'', fingerprintShort:$json.fingerprintShort||'', fp_alerts_24h:$json.fp_alerts_24h||0, fp_alerts_1h:$json.fp_alerts_1h||0, fp_last_alert_at:$json.fp_last_alert_at||'', isStormCondition:String($json.isStormCondition||false), stormDistinctCount:$json.stormDistinctCount||0, stormDominantCategory:$json.stormDominantCategory||'', stormDominantWorkflow:$json.stormDominantWorkflow||'', stormOtherWorkflowCount:$json.stormOtherWorkflowCount||0, stormSample:$json.stormSample||[], supervisorAction:$json.supervisorAction||'' }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const item=$input.first().json;const sd=$getWorkflowStaticData('global');const now=Date.now();if(item.retryGate!=='eligible')return[];const key='retry_'+item.fingerprint+'_meta';let meta=sd[key]||{count:0,firstSeen:now};if(now-meta.firstSeen>3600000)meta={count:0,firstSeen:now};const retryDelaySeconds=Math.min(15*Math.pow(2,meta.count),120)+Math.floor(Math.random()*5);meta.count++;meta.lastRetryAt=now;sd[key]=meta;const base=$env.N8N_BASE_URL||'http://localhost:5678';return[{json:{...item,shouldRetry:true,retryAttempt:meta.count,retryLimit:2,retryDelaySeconds,retryApiUrl:base+'/api/v1/executions/'+item.executionId+'/retry',autoRetryReason:'retryable transient failure (planned attempt '+meta.count+'/2, delay '+retryDelaySeconds+'s)'}}];

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ traceId:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.traceId, workflowName:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.workflowName, executionId:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.executionId, fingerprint:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.fingerprint, status:$json.error?'retry_submit_failed':'retry_submitted', retryGate:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.retryGate||'eligible', retryAttempt:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.retryAttempt, retryLimit:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.retryLimit, retryDelaySeconds:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.retryDelaySeconds, category:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.category, autoRetryReason:$('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.autoRetryReason, httpError:$json.error?($json.error.message||'retry API call failed'):'' }) }}

parameters.content:
## 🛡️ Supervisor Core V1 Lean (Round 22 Build)
**18 executable nodes. R22 internal hardening, zero new nodes.**

- R22: dead output fields removed
- R22: Core storm resolved banner removed; Heartbeat owns storm lifecycle
- R22: storm others named from stormSample
- R22: burst/retry staticData cleanup added
- R22: delivery failure banner grouped by deliveryKind
- R21: storm failedNode fix, Supervisor Action line, recovery probe estimate
